<section itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Article">
    <div id="masthead">
        <div class="container">
            <header>
                <p class="subheadline" itemprop="alternativeHeadline">
                    A full-stack sample web application built on top of Aspectran and MyBatis</p>
                <h1 itemprop="headline">JPetStore Demo</h1>
                <p class="teaser" itemprop="description">
                    The goal of the JPetStore Demo App is to provide
                    and demonstrate a sample web application that leverages Aspectran and MyBatis.
                </p>
            </header>
            <div class="hexagons">
                <div class="hexagon hex1"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex2"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex3"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex5"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex6"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        
        <div class="container breadcrumb-bar">
            <nav role="navigation" aria-label="You are here:">
                <ol class="breadcrumb" itemprop="breadcrumb">
                    
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="https://public.aspectran.com/">Sample Apps</a></li>
                    
                    
                    <li class="breadcrumb-item active"><a href="/">JPetStore Demo</a></li>
                </ol>
            </nav>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="container page-content" id="jpetstore-content">
        
            







<div class="container p-3" style="background-color: #353b3e;">
    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-center justify-content-lg-start">
        <a href="/" class="d-flex align-items-center mb-2 mb-lg-0 text-white text-decoration-none">
            <img src="/images/logo-topbar.gif" alt="JPetStore">
        </a>
        <div class="col-12 col-md-auto me-lg-auto d-flex justify-content-center">
            <!-- Expanded menu for large screens and up -->
            <ul class="nav d-none d-xl-flex">
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/FISH">Fish</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/DOGS">Dogs</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/REPTILES">Reptiles</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/CATS">Cats</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/BIRDS">Birds</a></li>
                
                <li>
                    
                        <a class="nav-link px-2 text-warning" href="https://public.aspectran.com/monitoring/#jpetstore" target="_blank" title="VReal-time logs, metrics, and traffic monitoring">AppMon</a>
                    
                    
                </li>
                <li><a class="nav-link px-2" href="/help.html">?</a></li>
            </ul>
            <!-- Dropdown menu for screens smaller than large -->
            <div class="nav d-xl-none">
                <div class="nav-item dropdown">
                    <a class="nav-link dropdown-toggle px-2 text-white" href="#" role="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
                        Categories
                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu">
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/FISH">Fish</a></li>

                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/CATS">Cats</a></li>

                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">

                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" href="/help.html">?</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="me-lg-3 mb-lg-0">
            <a href="/cart/viewCart" class="btn btn-success">
                <i class="bi bi-cart4"></i> 0
            </a>
            
            
                <a href="/order/listOrders" class="btn btn-primary">My Orders</a>
                <div class="dropdown d-inline-block">
                    <a class="btn btn-secondary dropdown-toggle" id="dropdownMenuButton" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false" title="My Account">
                        <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i>
                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu" aria-labelledby="dropdownMenuButton">
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/account/editAccountForm">My Account</a></li>
                        <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"/></li>
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/account/signoff">Sign Out</a></li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            
        </div>
        <form class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-2 mt-3 mt-md-0" role="search" action="/catalog/searchProducts">
            <div class="input-group">
                <input type="search" class="form-control border-secondary-subtle" name="keyword" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search" aria-describedby="jpetstore-search-btn">
                <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary border-secondary-subtle" type="button" id="jpetstore-search-btn"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    $(function () {
        /* google search */
        $("form[name=google_quick_search]").submit(function (event) {
            window.open("https://www.google.com/search?q=" + this.keyword.value + "+site:https%3A%2F%2Faspectran.com");
            event.preventDefault();
        });
    });
</script>
<script>
    /* Creating custom :external selector */
    $.expr[':'].external = function (obj) {
        return obj.href
            && !obj.href.match(/aspectran.com\//)
            && !obj.href.match(/^javascript:/)
            && !obj.href.match(/^mailto:/)
            && (obj.hostname !== location.hostname);
    };
    $(function () {
        /* Add 'external' CSS class to all external links */
        $('a:external').addClass('external');
        /* turn target into target=_blank for elements w external class */
        $('.external').attr('target','_blank');
    })
</script>
<script>
    $(function () {
        let links = $("#navbarSupportedContent .navbar-nav a[href='" + decodeURI(location.pathname) + "']").last();
        if (links.length > 0) {
            let arr = [];
            arr.push({'name': links.text(), 'href': location.pathname});
            links.parentsUntil(".navbar-nav").each(function () {
                let a2 = $(this).find(".nav-link");
                if (a2.is("a")) {
                    let href = a2.attr("href");
                    if (href !== location.pathname) {
                        arr.push({'name': a2.text(), 'href': href || ""});
                    }
                }
            });
            arr.reverse();
            for (let i in arr) {
                console.log(i);
                let item = arr[i];
                let li = $("<li class='breadcrumb-item'></li>");
                if (i < arr.length - 1) {
                    $("<a/>").attr("href", item.href).text(item.name).appendTo(li);
                } else {
                    li.addClass("active").text(item.name);
                }
                li.appendTo(".breadcrumb");
            }
        }
        if (!$(".breadcrumb li").length) {
            $(".breadcrumb-bar").addClass("invisible");
        }
    });
</script>
<script>(function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement('script');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:'9e9c6012698c7083',t:'MTc3NTc2NzczNA=='};var a=document.createElement('script');a.src='/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js';document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement('iframe');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position='absolute';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border='none';a.style.visibility='hidden';document.body.appendChild(a);if('loading'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);'loading'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})();</script></body>
</html>


            



<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <script>
        (() => {
            const getStoredTheme = () => localStorage.getItem('theme');
            const getPreferredTheme = () => {
                const storedTheme = getStoredTheme();
                if (storedTheme) {
                    return storedTheme;
                }
                return 'auto';
            };
            const setTheme = theme => {
                const newTheme = theme === 'auto'
                    ? (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
                    : theme;
                document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme', newTheme);
            };
            setTheme(getPreferredTheme());
        })();
    </script>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

<section itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Article">
    <div id="masthead">
        <div class="container">
            <header>
                <p class="subheadline" itemprop="alternativeHeadline">
                    A full-stack sample web application built on top of Aspectran and MyBatis</p>
                <h1 itemprop="headline">JPetStore Demo</h1>
                <p class="teaser" itemprop="description">
                    The goal of the JPetStore Demo App is to provide
                    and demonstrate a sample web application that leverages Aspectran and MyBatis.
                </p>
            </header>
            <div class="hexagons">
                <div class="hexagon hex1"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex2"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex3"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex5"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex6"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        
        <div class="container breadcrumb-bar">
            <nav role="navigation" aria-label="You are here:">
                <ol class="breadcrumb" itemprop="breadcrumb">
                    
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="https://public.aspectran.com/">Sample Apps</a></li>
                    
                    
                    <li class="breadcrumb-item active"><a href="/">JPetStore Demo</a></li>
                </ol>
            </nav>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="container page-content" id="jpetstore-content">
        
            







<div class="container p-3" style="background-color: #353b3e;">
    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-center justify-content-lg-start">
        <a href="/" class="d-flex align-items-center mb-2 mb-lg-0 text-white text-decoration-none">
            <img src="/images/logo-topbar.gif" alt="JPetStore">
        </a>

            <!-- Expanded menu for large screens and up -->
            <ul class="nav d-none d-xl-flex">

                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/DOGS">Dogs</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/REPTILES">Reptiles</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/CATS">Cats</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/BIRDS">Birds</a></li>
                
                <li>
                    
                        <a class="nav-link px-2 text-warning" href="https://public.aspectran.com/monitoring/#jpetstore" target="_blank" title="VReal-time logs, metrics, and traffic monitoring">AppMon</a>

            </ul>

                        Categories
                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu">
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/FISH">Fish</a></li>

                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">
                
                    <a class="nav-link text-warning" href="https://public.aspectran.com/monitoring/#jpetstore" target="_blank" title="Real-time logs, metrics, and traffic monitoring">AppMon</a>
                
                
                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" href="/help.html">?</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="me-lg-3 mb-lg-0">
            <a href="/cart/viewCart" class="btn btn-success">
                <i class="bi bi-cart4"></i> 0
            </a>
            
            
                <a href="/order/listOrders" class="btn btn-primary">My Orders</a>
                <div class="dropdown d-inline-block">
                    <a class="btn btn-secondary dropdown-toggle" id="dropdownMenuButton" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false" title="My Account">
                        <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i>
                    </a>

                        <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"/></li>
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/account/signoff">Sign Out</a></li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            
        </div>
        <form class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-2 mt-3 mt-md-0" role="search" action="/catalog/searchProducts">
            <div class="input-group">
                <input type="search" class="form-control border-secondary-subtle" name="keyword" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search" aria-describedby="jpetstore-search-btn">
                <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary border-secondary-subtle" type="button" id="jpetstore-search-btn"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    $(function () {
        /* google search */
        $("form[name=google_quick_search]").submit(function (event) {
            window.open("https://www.google.com/search?q=" + this.keyword.value + "+site:https%3A%2F%2Faspectran.com");
            event.preventDefault();
        });
    });
</script>
<script>
    /* Creating custom :external selector */
    $.expr[':'].external = function (obj) {
        return obj.href
            && !obj.href.match(/aspectran.com\//)
            && !obj.href.match(/^javascript:/)
            && !obj.href.match(/^mailto:/)
            && (obj.hostname !== location.hostname);
    };
    $(function () {
        /* Add 'external' CSS class to all external links */
        $('a:external').addClass('external');
        /* turn target into target=_blank for elements w external class */
        $('.external').attr('target','_blank');
    })
</script>
<script>
    $(function () {
        let links = $("#navbarSupportedContent .navbar-nav a[href='" + decodeURI(location.pathname) + "']").last();
        if (links.length > 0) {
            let arr = [];
            arr.push({'name': links.text(), 'href': location.pathname});
            links.parentsUntil(".navbar-nav").each(function () {
                let a2 = $(this).find(".nav-link");
                if (a2.is("a")) {
                    let href = a2.attr("href");
                    if (href !== location.pathname) {
                        arr.push({'name': a2.text(), 'href': href || ""});
                    }
                }
            });
            arr.reverse();
            for (let i in arr) {
                console.log(i);
                let item = arr[i];
                let li = $("<li class='breadcrumb-item'></li>");
                if (i < arr.length - 1) {
                    $("<a/>").attr("href", item.href).text(item.name).appendTo(li);
                } else {
                    li.addClass("active").text(item.name);
                }
                li.appendTo(".breadcrumb");
            }
        }
        if (!$(".breadcrumb li").length) {
            $(".breadcrumb-bar").addClass("invisible");
        }
    });
</script>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <script>
        (() => {
            const getStoredTheme = () => localStorage.getItem('theme');
            const getPreferredTheme = () => {
                const storedTheme = getStoredTheme();
                if (storedTheme) {
                    return storedTheme;
                }
                return 'auto';
            };
            const setTheme = theme => {
                const newTheme = theme === 'auto'
                    ? (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
                    : theme;
                document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme', newTheme);
            };
            setTheme(getPreferredTheme());
        })();
    </script>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

<section itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Article">
    <div id="masthead">
        <div class="container">
            <header>
                <p class="subheadline" itemprop="alternativeHeadline">
                    A full-stack sample web application built on top of Aspectran and MyBatis</p>
                <h1 itemprop="headline">JPetStore Demo</h1>
                <p class="teaser" itemprop="description">
                    The goal of the JPetStore Demo App is to provide
                    and demonstrate a sample web application that leverages Aspectran and MyBatis.
                </p>
            </header>
            <div class="hexagons">
                <div class="hexagon hex1"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex2"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex3"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex5"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex6"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        
        <div class="container breadcrumb-bar">
            <nav role="navigation" aria-label="You are here:">
                <ol class="breadcrumb" itemprop="breadcrumb">
                    
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="https://public.aspectran.com/">Sample Apps</a></li>
                    
                    
                    <li class="breadcrumb-item active"><a href="/">JPetStore Demo</a></li>
                </ol>
            </nav>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="container page-content" id="jpetstore-content">
        
            









<div class="container p-3" style="background-color: #353b3e;">
    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-center justify-content-lg-start">
        <a href="/" class="d-flex align-items-center mb-2 mb-lg-0 text-white text-decoration-none">
            <img src="/images/logo-topbar.gif" alt="JPetStore">
        </a>
        <div class="col-12 col-md-auto me-lg-auto d-flex justify-content-center">
            <!-- Expanded menu for large screens and up -->
            <ul class="nav d-none d-xl-flex">
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/FISH">Fish</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/DOGS">Dogs</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/REPTILES">Reptiles</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/CATS">Cats</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/BIRDS">Birds</a></li>
                
                <li>
                    
                        <a class="nav-link px-2 text-warning" href="https://public.aspectran.com/monitoring/#jpetstore" target="_blank" title="VReal-time logs, metrics, and traffic monitoring">AppMon</a>
                    
                    
                </li>
                <li><a class="nav-link px-2" href="/help.html">?</a></li>
            </ul>
            <!-- Dropdown menu for screens smaller than large -->
            <div class="nav d-xl-none">
                <div class="nav-item dropdown">
                    <a class="nav-link dropdown-toggle px-2 text-white" href="#" role="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
                        Categories
                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu">
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/FISH">Fish</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/DOGS">Dogs</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/REPTILES">Reptiles</a></li>

                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">
                
                    <a class="nav-link text-warning" href="https://public.aspectran.com/monitoring/#jpetstore" target="_blank" title="Real-time logs, metrics, and traffic monitoring">AppMon</a>
                
                
                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" href="/help.html">?</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="me-lg-3 mb-lg-0">
            <a href="/cart/viewCart" class="btn btn-success">
                <i class="bi bi-cart4"></i> 0
            </a>
            
            
                <a href="/order/listOrders" class="btn btn-primary">My Orders</a>
                <div class="dropdown d-inline-block">
                    <a class="btn btn-secondary dropdown-toggle" id="dropdownMenuButton" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false" title="My Account">
                        <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i>
                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu" aria-labelledby="dropdownMenuButton">
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/account/editAccountForm">My Account</a></li>
                        <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"/></li>
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/account/signoff">Sign Out</a></li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            
        </div>
        <form class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-2 mt-3 mt-md-0" role="search" action="/catalog/searchProducts">
            <div class="input-group">
                <input type="search" class="form-control border-secondary-subtle" name="keyword" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search" aria-describedby="jpetstore-search-btn">
                <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary border-secondary-subtle" type="button" id="jpetstore-search-btn"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="container py-4 px-3 px-lg-4">

<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">

<script>
    $(function () {
        /* google search */
        $("form[name=google_quick_search]").submit(function (event) {
            window.open("https://www.google.com/search?q=" + this.keyword.value + "+site:https%3A%2F%2Faspectran.com");
            event.preventDefault();
        });
    });
</script>
<script>
    /* Creating custom :external selector */
    $.expr[':'].external = function (obj) {
        return obj.href
            && !obj.href.match(/aspectran.com\//)
            && !obj.href.match(/^javascript:/)
            && !obj.href.match(/^mailto:/)
            && (obj.hostname !== location.hostname);
    };
    $(function () {
        /* Add 'external' CSS class to all external links */
        $('a:external').addClass('external');
        /* turn target into target=_blank for elements w external class */
        $('.external').attr('target','_blank');
    })
</script>
<script>
    $(function () {
        let links = $("#navbarSupportedContent .navbar-nav a[href='" + decodeURI(location.pathname) + "']").last();
        if (links.length > 0) {
            let arr = [];
            arr.push({'name': links.text(), 'href': location.pathname});
            links.parentsUntil(".navbar-nav").each(function () {
                let a2 = $(this).find(".nav-link");
                if (a2.is("a")) {
                    let href = a2.attr("href");
                    if (href !== location.pathname) {
                        arr.push({'name': a2.text(), 'href': href || ""});
                    }
                }
            });
            arr.reverse();
            for (let i in arr) {
                console.log(i);
                let item = arr[i];
                let li = $("<li class='breadcrumb-item'></li>");
                if (i < arr.length - 1) {
                    $("<a/>").attr("href", item.href).text(item.name).appendTo(li);
                } else {
                    li.addClass("active").text(item.name);
                }
                li.appendTo(".breadcrumb");
            }
        }
        if (!$(".breadcrumb li").length) {
            $(".breadcrumb-bar").addClass("invisible");
        }
    });
</script>
<script>(function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement('script');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:'9e9c6013ba177083',t:'MTc3NTc2NzczNA=='};var a=document.createElement('script');a.src='/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js';document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement('iframe');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position='absolute';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border='none';a.style.visibility='hidden';document.body.appendChild(a);if('loading'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);'loading'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})();</script></body>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <script>
        (() => {
            const getStoredTheme = () => localStorage.getItem('theme');
            const getPreferredTheme = () => {
                const storedTheme = getStoredTheme();
                if (storedTheme) {
                    return storedTheme;
                }
                return 'auto';
            };
            const setTheme = theme => {
                const newTheme = theme === 'auto'
                    ? (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
                    : theme;
                document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme', newTheme);
            };
            setTheme(getPreferredTheme());
        })();
    </script>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <meta name="google" content="notranslate">
    <title>JPetStore Demo</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Welcome to the Aspectran Demo Site">

<section itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Article">
    <div id="masthead">
        <div class="container">
            <header>
                <p class="subheadline" itemprop="alternativeHeadline">
                    A full-stack sample web application built on top of Aspectran and MyBatis</p>
                <h1 itemprop="headline">JPetStore Demo</h1>
                <p class="teaser" itemprop="description">
                    The goal of the JPetStore Demo App is to provide
                    and demonstrate a sample web application that leverages Aspectran and MyBatis.
                </p>
            </header>
            <div class="hexagons">
                <div class="hexagon hex1"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex2"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex3"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex5"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex6"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        
        <div class="container breadcrumb-bar">
            <nav role="navigation" aria-label="You are here:">
                <ol class="breadcrumb" itemprop="breadcrumb">
                    
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="https://public.aspectran.com/">Sample Apps</a></li>
                    
                    
                    <li class="breadcrumb-item active"><a href="/">JPetStore Demo</a></li>
                </ol>
            </nav>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="container page-content" id="jpetstore-content">
        
            









<div class="container p-3" style="background-color: #353b3e;">
    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-center justify-content-lg-start">
        <a href="/" class="d-flex align-items-center mb-2 mb-lg-0 text-white text-decoration-none">
            <img src="/images/logo-topbar.gif" alt="JPetStore">
        </a>
        <div class="col-12 col-md-auto me-lg-auto d-flex justify-content-center">
            <!-- Expanded menu for large screens and up -->
            <ul class="nav d-none d-xl-flex">
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/FISH">Fish</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/DOGS">Dogs</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/REPTILES">Reptiles</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/CATS">Cats</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/BIRDS">Birds</a></li>
                
                <li>
                    
                        <a class="nav-link px-2 text-warning" href="https://public.aspectran.com/monitoring/#jpetstore" target="_blank" title="VReal-time logs, metrics, and traffic monitoring">AppMon</a>
                    
                    
                </li>
                <li><a class="nav-link px-2" href="/help.html">?</a></li>
            </ul>
            <!-- Dropdown menu for screens smaller than large -->
            <div class="nav d-xl-none">
                <div class="nav-item dropdown">
                    <a class="nav-link dropdown-toggle px-2 text-white" href="#" role="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
                        Categories
                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu">
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/FISH">Fish</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/DOGS">Dogs</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/REPTILES">Reptiles</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/CATS">Cats</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/BIRDS">Birds</a></li>
                        
                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">
                
                    <a class="nav-link text-warning" href="https://public.aspectran.com/monitoring/#jpetstore" target="_blank" title="Real-time logs, metrics, and traffic monitoring">AppMon</a>
                
                
                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" href="/help.html">?</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="me-lg-3 mb-lg-0">
            <a href="/cart/viewCart" class="btn btn-success">
                <i class="bi bi-cart4"></i> 0
            </a>
            
            
                <a href="/order/listOrders" class="btn btn-primary">My Orders</a>
                <div class="dropdown d-inline-block">
                    <a class="btn btn-secondary dropdown-toggle" id="dropdownMenuButton" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false" title="My Account">
                        <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i>
                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu" aria-labelledby="dropdownMenuButton">
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/account/editAccountForm">My Account</a></li>
                        <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"/></li>
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/account/signoff">Sign Out</a></li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            
        </div>
        <form class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-2 mt-3 mt-md-0" role="search" action="/catalog/searchProducts">
            <div class="input-group">
                <input type="search" class="form-control border-secondary-subtle" name="keyword" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search" aria-describedby="jpetstore-search-btn">
                <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary border-secondary-subtle" type="button" id="jpetstore-search-btn"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="container py-4 px-3 px-lg-4">

<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
    <h3>Bulldog</h3>
    <a class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" href="/categories/DOGS">Return to DOGS</a>
</div>

            <td>
                <a href="/products/K9-BD-01/items/EST-6">EST-6</a>
            </td>
            <td>K9-BD-01</td>
            <td>
                Male Adult  
                  Bulldog
            </td>
            <td>$18.50</td>
            <td class="text-end">
                <a class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" href="/cart/addItemToCart?itemId=EST-6">Add to Cart</a>
            </td>
        </tr>
    
        <tr>
            <td>
                <a href="/products/K9-BD-01/items/EST-7">EST-7</a>
            </td>
            <td>K9-BD-01</td>
            <td>
                Female Puppy  
                  Bulldog
            </td>
            <td>$18.50</td>
            <td class="text-end">
                <a class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" href="/cart/addItemToCart?itemId=EST-7">Add to Cart</a>
            </td>
        </tr>
    
    </tbody>
</table>


</div>

                        <a href="https://aspectran.com/aspectran/"><h5>About Aspectran</h5></a>

<script>
    $(function () {
        /* google search */
        $("form[name=google_quick_search]").submit(function (event) {
            window.open("https://www.google.com/search?q=" + this.keyword.value + "+site:https%3A%2F%2Faspectran.com");
            event.preventDefault();
        });
    });
</script>
<script>
    /* Creating custom :external selector */
    $.expr[':'].external = function (obj) {
        return obj.href
            && !obj.href.match(/aspectran.com\//)
            && !obj.href.match(/^javascript:/)
            && !obj.href.match(/^mailto:/)
            && (obj.hostname !== location.hostname);
    };
    $(function () {
        /* Add 'external' CSS class to all external links */
        $('a:external').addClass('external');
        /* turn target into target=_blank for elements w external class */
        $('.external').attr('target','_blank');
    })
</script>
<script>
    $(function () {
        let links = $("#navbarSupportedContent .navbar-nav a[href='" + decodeURI(location.pathname) + "']").last();
        if (links.length > 0) {
            let arr = [];
            arr.push({'name': links.text(), 'href': location.pathname});
            links.parentsUntil(".navbar-nav").each(function () {
                let a2 = $(this).find(".nav-link");
                if (a2.is("a")) {
                    let href = a2.attr("href");
                    if (href !== location.pathname) {
                        arr.push({'name': a2.text(), 'href': href || ""});
                    }
                }
            });
            arr.reverse();
            for (let i in arr) {
                console.log(i);
                let item = arr[i];
                let li = $("<li class='breadcrumb-item'></li>");
                if (i < arr.length - 1) {
                    $("<a/>").attr("href", item.href).text(item.name).appendTo(li);
                } else {
                    li.addClass("active").text(item.name);
                }
                li.appendTo(".breadcrumb");
            }
        }
        if (!$(".breadcrumb li").length) {
            $(".breadcrumb-bar").addClass("invisible");
        }
    });
</script>
<script>(function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement('script');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:'9e9c6013ba177083',t:'MTc3NTc2NzczNA=='};var a=document.createElement('script');a.src='/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js';document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement('iframe');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position='absolute';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border='none';a.style.visibility='hidden';document.body.appendChild(a);if('loading'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);'loading'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})();</script></body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <script>
        (() => {
            const getStoredTheme = () => localStorage.getItem('theme');
            const getPreferredTheme = () => {
                const storedTheme = getStoredTheme();
                if (storedTheme) {
                    return storedTheme;
                }
                return 'auto';
            };
            const setTheme = theme => {
                const newTheme = theme === 'auto'
                    ? (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
                    : theme;
                document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme', newTheme);
            };
            setTheme(getPreferredTheme());
        })();
    </script>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <meta name="google" content="notranslate">
    <title>JPetStore Demo</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Welcome to the Aspectran Demo Site">

    <link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="57x57" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/aspectran/aspectran-assets@main/assets/img/apple-icon-57x57.png">

<section itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Article">
    <div id="masthead">
        <div class="container">
            <header>
                <p class="subheadline" itemprop="alternativeHeadline">
                    A full-stack sample web application built on top of Aspectran and MyBatis</p>
                <h1 itemprop="headline">JPetStore Demo</h1>
                <p class="teaser" itemprop="description">
                    The goal of the JPetStore Demo App is to provide
                    and demonstrate a sample web application that leverages Aspectran and MyBatis.
                </p>
            </header>
            <div class="hexagons">
                <div class="hexagon hex1"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex2"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex3"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex5"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex6"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        
        <div class="container breadcrumb-bar">
            <nav role="navigation" aria-label="You are here:">
                <ol class="breadcrumb" itemprop="breadcrumb">
                    
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="https://public.aspectran.com/">Sample Apps</a></li>
                    
                    
                    <li class="breadcrumb-item active"><a href="/">JPetStore Demo</a></li>
                </ol>
            </nav>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="container page-content" id="jpetstore-content">
        
            









<div class="container p-3" style="background-color: #353b3e;">
    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-center justify-content-lg-start">
        <a href="/" class="d-flex align-items-center mb-2 mb-lg-0 text-white text-decoration-none">
            <img src="/images/logo-topbar.gif" alt="JPetStore">
        </a>
        <div class="col-12 col-md-auto me-lg-auto d-flex justify-content-center">
            <!-- Expanded menu for large screens and up -->
            <ul class="nav d-none d-xl-flex">
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/FISH">Fish</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/DOGS">Dogs</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/REPTILES">Reptiles</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/CATS">Cats</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/BIRDS">Birds</a></li>
                
                <li>
                    
                        <a class="nav-link px-2 text-warning" href="https://public.aspectran.com/monitoring/#jpetstore" target="_blank" title="VReal-time logs, metrics, and traffic monitoring">AppMon</a>
                    
                    
                </li>
                <li><a class="nav-link px-2" href="/help.html">?</a></li>
            </ul>
            <!-- Dropdown menu for screens smaller than large -->
            <div class="nav d-xl-none">
                <div class="nav-item dropdown">
                    <a class="nav-link dropdown-toggle px-2 text-white" href="#" role="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
                        Categories
                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu">
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/FISH">Fish</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/DOGS">Dogs</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/REPTILES">Reptiles</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/CATS">Cats</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/BIRDS">Birds</a></li>
                        
                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">
                
                    <a class="nav-link text-warning" href="https://public.aspectran.com/monitoring/#jpetstore" target="_blank" title="Real-time logs, metrics, and traffic monitoring">AppMon</a>
                
                
                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" href="/help.html">?</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="me-lg-3 mb-lg-0">
            <a href="/cart/viewCart" class="btn btn-success">
                <i class="bi bi-cart4"></i> 1
            </a>
            
            
                <a href="/order/listOrders" class="btn btn-primary">My Orders</a>
                <div class="dropdown d-inline-block">
                    <a class="btn btn-secondary dropdown-toggle" id="dropdownMenuButton" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false" title="My Account">
                        <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i>
                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu" aria-labelledby="dropdownMenuButton">
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/account/editAccountForm">My Account</a></li>
                        <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"/></li>
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/account/signoff">Sign Out</a></li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            
        </div>
        <form class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-2 mt-3 mt-md-0" role="search" action="/catalog/searchProducts">
            <div class="input-group">
                <input type="search" class="form-control border-secondary-subtle" name="keyword" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search" aria-describedby="jpetstore-search-btn">
                <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary border-secondary-subtle" type="button" id="jpetstore-search-btn"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="container py-4 px-3 px-lg-4">

<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
    <h3>Shopping Cart</h3>
    <a class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" href="/">Return to Main Menu</a>
</div>

<form method="post" hx-post="/cart/updateCartQuantities" hx-target="#jpetstore-content">
    <table class="table table-striped">
        <thead>
        <tr>
            <th><b>Item ID</b></th>
            <th><b>Product ID</b></th>
            <th><b>Description</b></th>
            <th><b>In Stock?</b></th>
            <th><b>Quantity</b></th>
            <th><b>List Price</b></th>
            <th><b>Total Cost</b></th>
            <th>&nbsp;</th>
        </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody class="table-group-divider">
        
        
            <tr>
                <td>
                    <a href="/products/K9-BD-01/items/EST-6">EST-6</a>
                </td>
                <td>K9-BD-01</td>
                <td align="left">
                    Male Adult 
                     
                     Bulldog
                </td>
                <td>true</td>
                <td><input type="number" name="EST-6" size="3" maxlength="3" value="1"/></td>
                <td>$18.50</td>
                <td>$18.50</td>
                <td class="text-end">
                    <a class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" hx-post="/cart/removeItemFromCart?cartItem=EST-6" hx-target="#jpetstore-content">Remove</a>
                </td>
            </tr>
        
        </tbody>
        <tfoot class="table-group-divider">
        <tr>
            <td colspan="4"></td>
            <td>
                
                    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" type="submit">Update Cart</button>
                
            </td>
            <td><strong>Sub Total:</strong></td>
            <td><strong>$18.50</strong></td>
            <td class="text-end">
                
                    <a class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" hx-post="/cart/removeAllItemsFromCart" hx-target="#jpetstore-content">Remove All</a>
                
            </td>
        </tr>
        </tfoot>
    </table>

</form>


    <div class="text-center">
        <a class="btn btn-success" href="/order/newOrderForm">Proceed to Checkout</a>
    </div>


<div class="mt-5">

</div>

<script>
    $(function () {
        /* google search */
        $("form[name=google_quick_search]").submit(function (event) {
            window.open("https://www.google.com/search?q=" + this.keyword.value + "+site:https%3A%2F%2Faspectran.com");
            event.preventDefault();
        });
    });
</script>
<script>
    /* Creating custom :external selector */
    $.expr[':'].external = function (obj) {
        return obj.href
            && !obj.href.match(/aspectran.com\//)
            && !obj.href.match(/^javascript:/)
            && !obj.href.match(/^mailto:/)
            && (obj.hostname !== location.hostname);
    };
    $(function () {
        /* Add 'external' CSS class to all external links */
        $('a:external').addClass('external');
        /* turn target into target=_blank for elements w external class */
        $('.external').attr('target','_blank');
    })
</script>
<script>
    $(function () {
        let links = $("#navbarSupportedContent .navbar-nav a[href='" + decodeURI(location.pathname) + "']").last();
        if (links.length > 0) {
            let arr = [];
            arr.push({'name': links.text(), 'href': location.pathname});
            links.parentsUntil(".navbar-nav").each(function () {
                let a2 = $(this).find(".nav-link");
                if (a2.is("a")) {
                    let href = a2.attr("href");
                    if (href !== location.pathname) {
                        arr.push({'name': a2.text(), 'href': href || ""});
                    }
                }
            });
            arr.reverse();
            for (let i in arr) {
                console.log(i);
                let item = arr[i];
                let li = $("<li class='breadcrumb-item'></li>");
                if (i < arr.length - 1) {
                    $("<a/>").attr("href", item.href).text(item.name).appendTo(li);
                } else {
                    li.addClass("active").text(item.name);
                }
                li.appendTo(".breadcrumb");
            }
        }
        if (!$(".breadcrumb li").length) {
            $(".breadcrumb-bar").addClass("invisible");
        }
    });
</script>
<script>(function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement('script');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:'9e9c60164ba97083',t:'MTc3NTc2NzczNA=='};var a=document.createElement('script');a.src='/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js';document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement('iframe');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position='absolute';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border='none';a.style.visibility='hidden';document.body.appendChild(a);if('loading'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);'loading'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})();</script></body>
</html>


            



<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <script>
        (() => {
            const getStoredTheme = () => localStorage.getItem('theme');
            const getPreferredTheme = () => {
                const storedTheme = getStoredTheme();
                if (storedTheme) {
                    return storedTheme;
                }
                return 'auto';
            };
            const setTheme = theme => {
                const newTheme = theme === 'auto'
                    ? (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
                    : theme;
                document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme', newTheme);
            };
            setTheme(getPreferredTheme());
        })();
    </script>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

<section itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Article">
    <div id="masthead">
        <div class="container">
            <header>
                <p class="subheadline" itemprop="alternativeHeadline">
                    A full-stack sample web application built on top of Aspectran and MyBatis</p>
                <h1 itemprop="headline">JPetStore Demo</h1>
                <p class="teaser" itemprop="description">
                    The goal of the JPetStore Demo App is to provide
                    and demonstrate a sample web application that leverages Aspectran and MyBatis.
                </p>
            </header>
            <div class="hexagons">
                <div class="hexagon hex1"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex2"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex3"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex5"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex6"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        
        <div class="container breadcrumb-bar">
            <nav role="navigation" aria-label="You are here:">
                <ol class="breadcrumb" itemprop="breadcrumb">
                    
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="https://public.aspectran.com/">Sample Apps</a></li>
                    
                    
                    <li class="breadcrumb-item active"><a href="/">JPetStore Demo</a></li>
                </ol>
            </nav>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="container page-content" id="jpetstore-content">
        
            









<div class="container p-3" style="background-color: #353b3e;">
    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-center justify-content-lg-start">
        <a href="/" class="d-flex align-items-center mb-2 mb-lg-0 text-white text-decoration-none">
            <img src="/images/logo-topbar.gif" alt="JPetStore">
        </a>
        <div class="col-12 col-md-auto me-lg-auto d-flex justify-content-center">
            <!-- Expanded menu for large screens and up -->
            <ul class="nav d-none d-xl-flex">
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/FISH">Fish</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/DOGS">Dogs</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/REPTILES">Reptiles</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/CATS">Cats</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/BIRDS">Birds</a></li>
                
                <li>
                    
                        <a class="nav-link px-2 text-warning" href="https://public.aspectran.com/monitoring/#jpetstore" target="_blank" title="VReal-time logs, metrics, and traffic monitoring">AppMon</a>
                    
                    
                </li>
                <li><a class="nav-link px-2" href="/help.html">?</a></li>
            </ul>
            <!-- Dropdown menu for screens smaller than large -->
            <div class="nav d-xl-none">
                <div class="nav-item dropdown">
                    <a class="nav-link dropdown-toggle px-2 text-white" href="#" role="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
                        Categories
                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu">
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/FISH">Fish</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/DOGS">Dogs</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/REPTILES">Reptiles</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/CATS">Cats</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/BIRDS">Birds</a></li>
                        
                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">
                
                    <a class="nav-link text-warning" href="https://public.aspectran.com/monitoring/#jpetstore" target="_blank" title="Real-time logs, metrics, and traffic monitoring">AppMon</a>
                
                
                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" href="/help.html">?</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="me-lg-3 mb-lg-0">
            <a href="/cart/viewCart" class="btn btn-success">
                <i class="bi bi-cart4"></i> 1
            </a>
            
            
                <a href="/order/listOrders" class="btn btn-primary">My Orders</a>
                <div class="dropdown d-inline-block">
                    <a class="btn btn-secondary dropdown-toggle" id="dropdownMenuButton" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false" title="My Account">
                        <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i>
                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu" aria-labelledby="dropdownMenuButton">
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/account/editAccountForm">My Account</a></li>
                        <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"/></li>
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/account/signoff">Sign Out</a></li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            
        </div>
        <form class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-2 mt-3 mt-md-0" role="search" action="/catalog/searchProducts">
            <div class="input-group">
                <input type="search" class="form-control border-secondary-subtle" name="keyword" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search" aria-describedby="jpetstore-search-btn">
                <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary border-secondary-subtle" type="button" id="jpetstore-search-btn"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>
<div class="container py-4 px-3 px-lg-4">

<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3">
    <h3>Shopping Cart</h3>
    <a class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" href="/">Return to Main Menu</a>
</div>

<form method="post" hx-post="/cart/updateCartQuantities" hx-target="#jpetstore-content">
    <table class="table table-striped">
        <thead>
        <tr>
            <th><b>Item ID</b></th>
            <th><b>Product ID</b></th>
            <th><b>Description</b></th>
            <th><b>In Stock?</b></th>
            <th><b>Quantity</b></th>
            <th><b>List Price</b></th>
            <th><b>Total Cost</b></th>
            <th>&nbsp;</th>
        </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody class="table-group-divider">
        
        
            <tr>
                <td>
                    <a href="/products/K9-BD-01/items/EST-6">EST-6</a>
                </td>
                <td>K9-BD-01</td>
                <td align="left">
                    Male Adult 
                     
                     Bulldog
                </td>
                <td>true</td>
                <td><input type="number" name="EST-6" size="3" maxlength="3" value="1"/></td>
                <td>$18.50</td>
                <td>$18.50</td>
                <td class="text-end">
                    <a class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" hx-post="/cart/removeItemFromCart?cartItem=EST-6" hx-target="#jpetstore-content">Remove</a>
                </td>
            </tr>
        
        </tbody>
        <tfoot class="table-group-divider">
        <tr>
            <td colspan="4"></td>
            <td>
                
                    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" type="submit">Update Cart</button>
                
            </td>
            <td><strong>Sub Total:</strong></td>
            <td><strong>$18.50</strong></td>
            <td class="text-end">
                
                    <a class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" hx-post="/cart/removeAllItemsFromCart" hx-target="#jpetstore-content">Remove All</a>
                
            </td>
        </tr>
        </tfoot>
    </table>

</form>


    <div class="text-center">
        <a class="btn btn-success" href="/order/newOrderForm">Proceed to Checkout</a>
    </div>


<div class="mt-5">
    
        
            




	<div class="panel">

				</li>

</div>

                    <div>
                        <a href="https://aspectran.com/aspectran/"><h5>About Aspectran</h5></a>

<script>
    $(function () {
        /* google search */
        $("form[name=google_quick_search]").submit(function (event) {
            window.open("https://www.google.com/search?q=" + this.keyword.value + "+site:https%3A%2F%2Faspectran.com");
            event.preventDefault();
        });
    });
</script>
<script>
    /* Creating custom :external selector */
    $.expr[':'].external = function (obj) {
        return obj.href
            && !obj.href.match(/aspectran.com\//)
            && !obj.href.match(/^javascript:/)
            && !obj.href.match(/^mailto:/)
            && (obj.hostname !== location.hostname);
    };
    $(function () {
        /* Add 'external' CSS class to all external links */
        $('a:external').addClass('external');
        /* turn target into target=_blank for elements w external class */
        $('.external').attr('target','_blank');
    })
</script>
<script>
    $(function () {
        let links = $("#navbarSupportedContent .navbar-nav a[href='" + decodeURI(location.pathname) + "']").last();
        if (links.length > 0) {
            let arr = [];
            arr.push({'name': links.text(), 'href': location.pathname});
            links.parentsUntil(".navbar-nav").each(function () {
                let a2 = $(this).find(".nav-link");
                if (a2.is("a")) {
                    let href = a2.attr("href");
                    if (href !== location.pathname) {
                        arr.push({'name': a2.text(), 'href': href || ""});
                    }
                }
            });
            arr.reverse();
            for (let i in arr) {
                console.log(i);
                let item = arr[i];
                let li = $("<li class='breadcrumb-item'></li>");
                if (i < arr.length - 1) {
                    $("<a/>").attr("href", item.href).text(item.name).appendTo(li);
                } else {
                    li.addClass("active").text(item.name);
                }
                li.appendTo(".breadcrumb");
            }
        }
        if (!$(".breadcrumb li").length) {
            $(".breadcrumb-bar").addClass("invisible");
        }
    });
</script>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <script>
        (() => {
            const getStoredTheme = () => localStorage.getItem('theme');
            const getPreferredTheme = () => {
                const storedTheme = getStoredTheme();
                if (storedTheme) {
                    return storedTheme;
                }
                return 'auto';
            };
            const setTheme = theme => {
                const newTheme = theme === 'auto'
                    ? (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
                    : theme;
                document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme', newTheme);
            };
            setTheme(getPreferredTheme());
        })();
    </script>

<section itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Article">
    <div id="masthead">
        <div class="container">
            <header>
                <p class="subheadline" itemprop="alternativeHeadline">
                    A full-stack sample web application built on top of Aspectran and MyBatis</p>
                <h1 itemprop="headline">JPetStore Demo</h1>
                <p class="teaser" itemprop="description">
                    The goal of the JPetStore Demo App is to provide
                    and demonstrate a sample web application that leverages Aspectran and MyBatis.
                </p>
            </header>
            <div class="hexagons">
                <div class="hexagon hex1"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex2"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex3"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex5"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex6"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        
        <div class="container breadcrumb-bar">
            <nav role="navigation" aria-label="You are here:">
                <ol class="breadcrumb" itemprop="breadcrumb">
                    
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="https://public.aspectran.com/">Sample Apps</a></li>
                    
                    
                    <li class="breadcrumb-item active"><a href="/">JPetStore Demo</a></li>
                </ol>
            </nav>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="container page-content" id="jpetstore-content">
        
            







<div class="container p-3" style="background-color: #353b3e;">
    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-center justify-content-lg-start">
        <a href="/" class="d-flex align-items-center mb-2 mb-lg-0 text-white text-decoration-none">
            <img src="/images/logo-topbar.gif" alt="JPetStore">
        </a>
        <div class="col-12 col-md-auto me-lg-auto d-flex justify-content-center">
            <!-- Expanded menu for large screens and up -->
            <ul class="nav d-none d-xl-flex">
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/FISH">Fish</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/DOGS">Dogs</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/REPTILES">Reptiles</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/CATS">Cats</a></li>
                
                    <li><a class="nav-link px-2 text-white" href="/categories/BIRDS">Birds</a></li>
                
                <li>
                    
                        <a class="nav-link px-2 text-warning" href="https://public.aspectran.com/monitoring/#jpetstore" target="_blank" title="VReal-time logs, metrics, and traffic monitoring">AppMon</a>
                    
                    
                </li>
                <li><a class="nav-link px-2" href="/help.html">?</a></li>
            </ul>
            <!-- Dropdown menu for screens smaller than large -->
            <div class="nav d-xl-none">
                <div class="nav-item dropdown">
                    <a class="nav-link dropdown-toggle px-2 text-white" href="#" role="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
                        Categories
                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu">
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/FISH">Fish</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/DOGS">Dogs</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/REPTILES">Reptiles</a></li>
                        
                            <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/categories/CATS">Cats</a></li>

                    </ul>
                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">
                
                    <a class="nav-link text-warning" href="https://public.aspectran.com/monitoring/#jpetstore" target="_blank" title="Real-time logs, metrics, and traffic monitoring">AppMon</a>
                
                
                </div>
                <div class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" href="/help.html">?</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="me-lg-3 mb-lg-0">
            <a href="/cart/viewCart" class="btn btn-success">
                <i class="bi bi-cart4"></i> 1
            </a>
            
            
                <a href="/order/listOrders" class="btn btn-primary">My Orders</a>
                <div class="dropdown d-inline-block">
                    <a class="btn btn-secondary dropdown-toggle" id="dropdownMenuButton" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false" title="My Account">
                        <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i>
                    </a>
                    <ul class="dropdown-menu" aria-labelledby="dropdownMenuButton">
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/account/editAccountForm">My Account</a></li>
                        <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"/></li>
                        <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="/account/signoff">Sign Out</a></li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            
        </div>
        <form class="col-12 col-md-6 col-lg-2 mt-3 mt-md-0" role="search" action="/catalog/searchProducts">
            <div class="input-group">
                <input type="search" class="form-control border-secondary-subtle" name="keyword" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search" aria-describedby="jpetstore-search-btn">
                <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary border-secondary-subtle" type="button" id="jpetstore-search-btn"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    $(function () {
        /* google search */
        $("form[name=google_quick_search]").submit(function (event) {
            window.open("https://www.google.com/search?q=" + this.keyword.value + "+site:https%3A%2F%2Faspectran.com");
            event.preventDefault();
        });
    });
</script>
<script>
    /* Creating custom :external selector */
    $.expr[':'].external = function (obj) {
        return obj.href
            && !obj.href.match(/aspectran.com\//)
            && !obj.href.match(/^javascript:/)
            && !obj.href.match(/^mailto:/)
            && (obj.hostname !== location.hostname);
    };
    $(function () {
        /* Add 'external' CSS class to all external links */
        $('a:external').addClass('external');
        /* turn target into target=_blank for elements w external class */
        $('.external').attr('target','_blank');
    })
</script>
<script>
    $(function () {
        let links = $("#navbarSupportedContent .navbar-nav a[href='" + decodeURI(location.pathname) + "']").last();
        if (links.length > 0) {
            let arr = [];
            arr.push({'name': links.text(), 'href': location.pathname});
            links.parentsUntil(".navbar-nav").each(function () {
                let a2 = $(this).find(".nav-link");
                if (a2.is("a")) {
                    let href = a2.attr("href");
                    if (href !== location.pathname) {
                        arr.push({'name': a2.text(), 'href': href || ""});
                    }
                }
            });
            arr.reverse();
            for (let i in arr) {
                console.log(i);
                let item = arr[i];
                let li = $("<li class='breadcrumb-item'></li>");
                if (i < arr.length - 1) {
                    $("<a/>").attr("href", item.href).text(item.name).appendTo(li);
                } else {
                    li.addClass("active").text(item.name);
                }
                li.appendTo(".breadcrumb");
            }
        }
        if (!$(".breadcrumb li").length) {
            $(".breadcrumb-bar").addClass("invisible");
        }
    });
</script>
<script>(function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement('script');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:'9e9c6017dce07083',t:'MTc3NTc2NzczNQ=='};var a=document.createElement('script');a.src='/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js';document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement('iframe');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position='absolute';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border='none';a.style.visibility='hidden';document.body.appendChild(a);if('loading'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);'loading'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})();</script></body>
</html>


            



<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <script>
        (() => {
            const getStoredTheme = () => localStorage.getItem('theme');
            const getPreferredTheme = () => {
                const storedTheme = getStoredTheme();
                if (storedTheme) {
                    return storedTheme;
                }
                return 'auto';
            };
            const setTheme = theme => {
                const newTheme = theme === 'auto'
                    ? (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
                    : theme;
                document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme', newTheme);
            };
            setTheme(getPreferredTheme());
        })();
    </script>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

<section itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Article">
    <div id="masthead">
        <div class="container">
            <header>
                <p class="subheadline" itemprop="alternativeHeadline">
                    A full-stack sample web application built on top of Aspectran and MyBatis</p>
                <h1 itemprop="headline">JPetStore Demo</h1>
                <p class="teaser" itemprop="description">
                    The goal of the JPetStore Demo App is to provide
                    and demonstrate a sample web application that leverages Aspectran and MyBatis.
                </p>
            </header>
            <div class="hexagons">
                <div class="hexagon hex1"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex2"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex3"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex5"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex6"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        
        <div class="container breadcrumb-bar">
            <nav role="navigation" aria-label="You are here:">
                <ol class="breadcrumb" itemprop="breadcrumb">
                    
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="https://public.aspectran.com/">Sample Apps</a></li>
                    
                    
                    <li class="breadcrumb-item active"><a href="/">JPetStore Demo</a></li>
                </ol>
            </nav>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="container page-content" id="jpetstore-content">

            </a>

<script>
    $(function () {
        /* google search */
        $("form[name=google_quick_search]").submit(function (event) {
            window.open("https://www.google.com/search?q=" + this.keyword.value + "+site:https%3A%2F%2Faspectran.com");
            event.preventDefault();
        });
    });
</script>
<script>
    /* Creating custom :external selector */
    $.expr[':'].external = function (obj) {
        return obj.href
            && !obj.href.match(/aspectran.com\//)
            && !obj.href.match(/^javascript:/)
            && !obj.href.match(/^mailto:/)
            && (obj.hostname !== location.hostname);
    };
    $(function () {
        /* Add 'external' CSS class to all external links */
        $('a:external').addClass('external');
        /* turn target into target=_blank for elements w external class */
        $('.external').attr('target','_blank');
    })
</script>
<script>
    $(function () {
        let links = $("#navbarSupportedContent .navbar-nav a[href='" + decodeURI(location.pathname) + "']").last();
        if (links.length > 0) {
            let arr = [];
            arr.push({'name': links.text(), 'href': location.pathname});
            links.parentsUntil(".navbar-nav").each(function () {
                let a2 = $(this).find(".nav-link");
                if (a2.is("a")) {
                    let href = a2.attr("href");
                    if (href !== location.pathname) {
                        arr.push({'name': a2.text(), 'href': href || ""});
                    }
                }
            });
            arr.reverse();
            for (let i in arr) {
                console.log(i);
                let item = arr[i];
                let li = $("<li class='breadcrumb-item'></li>");
                if (i < arr.length - 1) {
                    $("<a/>").attr("href", item.href).text(item.name).appendTo(li);
                } else {
                    li.addClass("active").text(item.name);
                }
                li.appendTo(".breadcrumb");
            }
        }
        if (!$(".breadcrumb li").length) {
            $(".breadcrumb-bar").addClass("invisible");
        }
    });
</script>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <script>
        (() => {
            const getStoredTheme = () => localStorage.getItem('theme');
            const getPreferredTheme = () => {
                const storedTheme = getStoredTheme();
                if (storedTheme) {
                    return storedTheme;
                }
                return 'auto';
            };
            const setTheme = theme => {
                const newTheme = theme === 'auto'
                    ? (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light')
                    : theme;
                document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme', newTheme);
            };
            setTheme(getPreferredTheme());
        })();
    </script>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">

<section itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Article">
    <div id="masthead">
        <div class="container">
            <header>
                <p class="subheadline" itemprop="alternativeHeadline">
                    A full-stack sample web application built on top of Aspectran and MyBatis</p>
                <h1 itemprop="headline">JPetStore Demo</h1>
                <p class="teaser" itemprop="description">
                    The goal of the JPetStore Demo App is to provide
                    and demonstrate a sample web application that leverages Aspectran and MyBatis.
                </p>
            </header>
            <div class="hexagons">
                <div class="hexagon hex1"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex2"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex3"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex5"></div>
                <div class="hexagon hex6"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        
        <div class="container breadcrumb-bar">
            <nav role="navigation" aria-label="You are here:">
                <ol class="breadcrumb" itemprop="breadcrumb">
                    
                        <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="https://public.aspectran.com/">Sample Apps</a></li>
                    
                    
                    <li class="breadcrumb-item active"><a href="/">JPetStore Demo</a></li>
                </ol>
            </nav>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="container page-content" id="jpetstore-content">
        
            








<div class="container p-3" style="background-color: #353b3e;">
